title: Add Markitdown-for-Everyone to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Markitdown-for-Everyone](https://github.com/soyangelromero/Markitdown-for-Everyone) to build
- Markitdown-for-Everyone is a command-line tool using Microsoft MarkItDown and the Pollinations API to convert many file formats into Markdown.

Fixes #11813

gist.headline: Markdown magic
gist.blurb: A new community tool just dropped! Markitdown-for-Everyone uses the Pollinations API to magically convert almost any file format straight into clean Markdown.
gist.summary: Added the community-built CLI tool 'Markitdown-for-Everyone' to the apps directory, which leverages Microsoft MarkItDown and the Pollinations API to convert various file formats into Markdown.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a new command-line tool to easily transform their messy documents into clean Markdown using our API.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a CLI tool that converts files to Markdown. Visual symbols: documents, terminal/CLI, Markdown formatting. Let's have Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot feeding messy documents into a glowing terminal that spits out clean, organized Markdown files.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot feeding messy paper documents into a glowing retro terminal that spits out clean, perfectly organized pages with Markdown symbols. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
